checked_off_by_maintainer: Apply patch for CI typo fix + macOS autoreconf cleanup (applied as commit 24bfa0d)
notes: No regular open issues in the repo. Workflow files (.github/workflows/) are protected - GitHub Actions cannot push them; safeoutputs creates a patch for manual application. Past changes applied by maintainer directly to master: libxml2 CI removal (5367634), buffer tests (0251ad2), buffer byte arrays (e7030f4), CI typo fix (24bfa0d). Task 1 labelling is a no-op (no unlabelled issues). Buffer functions tested so far: write_byte, write_word, write_dword, write_buffer, is_empty, is_not_empty, clear, get_data_size, get_data (implicitly), set (test_83), append (test_84). Next run: consider tests for accessor functions (snap_accessors, tape_accessors), creator.c, IDE functions, or microdrive functions.
